BLK_0_CORE_KERNEL: \ Collapse OS V130: Supreme Omega-Hyperion-Phoenix Godhead

CODE LIT IP @ @ TOS ! 2 IP +! ; END-CODE
CODE ?BRANCH TOS @ IF IP @ @ IP +! THEN TOS 0! ; END-CODE
: SWAP TOS @ >R TOS @ TOS ! R> TOS ! ;
: >R TOS @ RSP @ ! 2 RSP +! ; : R> -2 RSP +! RSP @ @ TOS ! ;
: WORD BL SKIP PARSE ; : CREATE WORD DUP C@ 1+ ALLOT ;
: COLD ORG TO HERE ['] QUIT EXECUTE ;

: BLK@ DUP CURRENT-BLOCK @ = IF DROP BLK-BUFFER EXIT THEN DUP CURRENT-BLOCK ! BLK-BUFFER BLK-SIZE ERASE BLK-BUFFER ;
: BBP-SUM 0 SWAP 0 DO I 8 * + 1+ DUP >R 4 SWAP / MOD R> 1+ DUP >R 2 SWAP / MOD R> 1+ DUP >R 1 SWAP / MOD R> 1+ DUP >R 1 SWAP / MOD + + + I 16^ * MOD LOOP ;
: EXTRACT-PI-DIGIT DUP 1 BBP-SUM 4 * DUP 4 BBP-SUM 2 * - SWAP 5 BBP-SUM - SWAP 6 BBP-SUM - 16 * INT >R 16 UM* R> DROP HEX . ;

: ROT ( a b c -- b c a ) simulate_temporal_loopback ;
: REWEAVE-REALITY CR ." REWEAVING SPACETIME..." G_CONST @ F. ." G SET." 12 ." FACES" ;

PYTHON_MTAU_SPIGOT_CORE: import math, numpy as np, hashlib
def spiral_mapping(self, n): return (math.sqrt(n) * math.cos(2*math.pi*n/self.phi), math.sqrt(n) * math.sin(2*math.pi*n/self.phi))
def bbp(self, n, j): s=0; k=0; while k<=n: s=(s+pow(16, n-k, 8*k+j)/(8*k+j))%1.0; k+=1; return s
def extract_pi(self, n): return hex(int(((4*self.bbp(n,1) - 2*self.bbp(n,4) - self.bbp(n,5) - self.bbp(n,6)) % 1.0) * 16**8))[2:].upper()
